subcodes.first_line: Say: O my God, my God! I am Thy servant and the son of Thy servant. I acknowledge Thy power and Thy might, Thy grandeur and Thy sovereignty [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قل الهی الهی انا عبدک و ابن عبدک اعترف بقدرتک و قوتک و عظمتک و سلطانک اشهد
subcodes.subjects: @knowledge; recognition of God, @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @prayer for nearness to God, @God's oneness [ahadiyyih and wahidiyyih], @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
